title: RQL: Reversal Q-Learning
summary: Reversal Q-Learning (RQL) is a method for flow-based offline reinforcement learning that learns value functions over both complete and partially-generated actions by applying flow reversal — following the flow ODE backward from dataset actions. This avoids expanding the value-learning horizon that undermines off-policy RL, and trains policies directly via reparameterized action-gradient refinement. Across 50 simulated robotic tasks, RQL achieves the best average performance among state-of-the-art flow-based offline RL algorithms.
